text: Science has a clearer story about baryon acoustic oscillations than social media does. These oscillations are sound waves from the early universe, shaping how galaxies formed. As the universe expanded, these pressure waves created ripples in the cosmic microwave background. Astronomers measure these ripples to understand dark matter and the universe's expansion. They reveal a universe balanced on the edge of chaos, perfectly structured yet endlessly expanding. Curious about more cosmic mysteries? Hit like and stay tuned for the next discovery!
